narrative:
Youngstown City Sd city school district has 35,732 registered voters, with 59.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 3.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 37.1%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 33.6 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +8.8% D−R vs +49.0% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
